title: Jedi courier 1101
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Yoshicourier.jpg|thumb|Yoshi-Raph Elan's courier.]]

'''1101''' was a starship in which two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] retrieved Yoshi from [[Lourdes]]'s [[Lourdes' homeworld|homeworld]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 27|''Star Wars'' (1998) 27]]
